offer: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month, unplanned equipment maintenance causes project delays. We automate maintenance scheduling instead of manual tracking.
problem: Equipment downtime due to unplanned maintenance
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Community forums where contractors share tools
try_it: Let users try scheduling on 1-3 equipment items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing maintenance data
